command:
echo "=== SYSTEMD STATUS ==="
systemctl status gitea --no-pager -l 2>&1 | head -40

echo "=== JOSE APP.INI ==="
cat /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/conf/app.ini 2>/dev/null || echo NOT_FOUND

echo "=== ALT APP.INI ==="
cat /usr/local/bin/custom/conf/app.ini 2>/dev/null || echo NOT_FOUND

echo "=== DB SIZES ==="
ls -lah /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/gitea.db 2>/dev/null || echo NO_DB_JOSE
ls -lah /var/lib/gitea/data/gitea.db 2>/dev/null || echo NO_DB_VARLIB

echo "=== REPOS ==="
ls /home/jose/gitea/data/git/repositories/ 2>/dev/null || echo NO_REPOS_JOSE
ls /var/lib/gitea/repositories/ 2>/dev/null || echo NO_REPOS_VARLIB

echo "=== NAMEI ==="
namei -l /home/jose/gitea/data/gitea/conf/app.ini 2>/dev/null

echo "=== GIT USER ==="
id git

echo "=== VAR LIB GITEA ==="
ls -lah /var/lib/gitea 2>/dev/null || echo NOT_FOUND

echo "=== ETC GITEA ==="
ls -lah /etc/gitea 2>/dev/null || echo NOT_FOUND
